text: No faculty member may teach more than 12 hours per week of scheduled sections.
Lab sections must be held in lab-type rooms; lecture sections may be held in lecture halls or seminar rooms, provided room capacity is sufficient.
No student may be scheduled for two sections at the same day/time block. In particular, mandatory courses within the same program and year must never overlap.
A student may not register for a course before completing all of its listed prerequisite courses.
The room assigned to a section must have capacity greater than or equal to the section's estimated enrollment.
Faculty members may only be assigned to teach courses within their declared subject specialization(s).
